task_name: add model rename API endpoint and CLI command

details.reasoning: All rubric requirements are fully met: RenameRequest struct with correct json tags in api/types.go, Client.Rename method posting to /api/rename in api/client.go, RenameHandler in server/routes.go that copies the model then deletes source with proper 404 (source missing) and 409 (destination exists) error handling, route registration r.POST("/api/rename", s.RenameHandler), CLI command with cobra ExactArgs(2) in cmd/cmd.go, RenameHandler in CLI that calls client.Rename, and no existing test files were modified. Documentation updates to api.md and openapi.yaml demonstrate completeness.
